slides.slide-01: This is where AI gets very powerful across teams
slides.slide-02:
* basic idea, persistent context across sessions

*this is where agents get insane powerful, automated
slides.slide-03: *Copilot has a LOT of this baked into its fine tuning (explain fine tuning and how copilot does it)
slides.slide-04:
* Good for generic data
* Good: On every session
*Bad: giving too much non relavent context can bloat the agent
slides.slide-05:
* Hard boundaries/scripts are often better if same process always
* Soft boundaries are more complicated but more dynamic/flexible
* good harness context can keep the model focused (this is an art form)
slides.slide-06:
* Skills, custom workflows conditionally added
* Keeps agents context clean for work unrelated to skill
* Skills are an art form, complex
